title: Tender Tasty Ukrainian Monkfish Skewers
description: A festive Ukrainian dish featuring monkfish, glaze, and anti-inflammatory friendly ingredients, wrapped in ti leaves. This recipe combines the flavors of mustard and fluffy texture with the tenderness of monkfish.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, Dijon mustard, honey, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the monkfish pieces to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread 2-3 monkfish pieces onto each ti leaf, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the ti leaves with olive oil and season with salt.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the monkfish is cooked through.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve with lemon wedges.
Drizzle with additional honey and mustard glaze if desired.
